title: Chickenpox Relief Treatment | Colloidal Oatmeal & Calamine | Oatmeal Bath Soak for Chicken Pox Relief Kids - Colloidal Oatmeal Bath for Itchy Skin and Pain Relief | Made in UK | 300g
features: Gentle Relief for Sensitive Skin: Our oat bath soak with calamine offers a soothing alternative to chamomile lotion for children suffering from chickenpox and eczema. It provides immediate relief from itching and inflammation, catering to your child's delicate skin needs.

Effective Chickenpox Solution: Experience the dual benefits of our oat bath soak with calamine, ideal as a chickenpox cream for kids and as a pain relief cream. This targeted approach ensures quick and effective relief, helping your child feel better faster.

Nourishing Skin Care: Specially formulated for young, sensitive skin, our oat bath soak with calamine enhances skin's natural defenses. Regular use helps maintain a healthy skin barrier, crucial in preventing future outbreaks and discomfort.

Natural and Soothing: Opt for our natural oat bath soak with calamine as a gentle yet effective solution for managing symptoms of chickenpox. This product offers comprehensive skin care, soothing discomfort while protecting against skin irritation.

Simple and Mess-Free Application: Our oat bath soak with calamine is designed for ease of use, ensuring quick preparation and cleanup. Ideal for busy parents, this kid-friendly formula provides a straightforward way to manage your child's skin care during chickenpox recovery.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes and mucous membranes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use and consult a healthcare professional. Keep out of reach of children. Do not use on broken skin. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Use only as directed. In case of accidental ingestion, seek medical help immediately.
